div.p: Connect Odoo with your existing systems, third-party applications, and business tools to build a unified ecosystem that drives efficiency and growth.

div.h2: Odoo Integration Services That Connect Your Entire Business
div.p: Creyox Technologies delivers expert Odoo integration services that connect your ERP to every platform, system, and tool your business relies on eliminating data silos, reducing manual work, and building one unified ecosystem that runs itself.
Odoo Integration Experts
Platforms Successfully Integrated
REST, SOAP & GraphQL Expertise
Connectors Built from Scratch

div.h2: Disconnected Systems Are Quietly Costing Your Business Every Day

div.div: Your data lives in too many places in one system. Customers in another. Inventory somewhere else. Your team manually bridges the gap and every bridge is a potential error.
Your team wastes hours on manual data entry. Copying data between systems isn't a workflow, it's a liability. It slows your team down, introduces errors, and scales terribly as your business grows.
You can't get a clear picture of your business When your data is scattered, your decisions are guesswork. You can't see what's actually happening across your operations in real time.
Our Odoo ERP integration creates a single source of truth across all your platforms.
Our Odoo API integration automates data flow so your team focuses on work that actually matters.
Our Odoo integration solutions centralise your data so you always have the full picture, live.

div.h2: Start Faster with Our Pre-Built Odoo Integration Solutions
div.p: Why build from scratch when the connector is already built, tested, and live in production? Our pre-built Odoo integration connectors are purpose-built to simplify data flow, eliminate manual effort, and connect Odoo to the world's leading platforms deployable in days, not months.
Telephony & CRM Bring your phone system inside Odoo. Every call, every conversation, every lead logged, tracked, and actionable without switching between systems.
eCommerce & Social Commerce Connect TikTok Shop to Odoo and manage your fastest-growing sales channel from inside your ERP with zero manual syncing required.
Business Intelligence & Analytics Stop exporting spreadsheets. Connect Odoo directly to Power BI and let your data tell its story in real time with dashboards that update automatically.
Reporting & Collaboration Export live Odoo data into Google Sheets for teams that need collaborative, flexible reporting with two-way sync that keeps both platforms accurate.
Email Marketing & Automation Run smarter email marketing by connecting your Odoo customer data directly to Brevo keeping your campaigns and your CRM perfectly aligned.
Data Warehouse & Advanced Analytics Move beyond standard Odoo reporting. Push your Odoo data to Google BigQuery for enterprise-scale analytics, data warehousing, and advanced BI workflows.

div.h2: Every Integration Your Business Will Ever Need Under One Roof
div.p: From standard API connections to complex custom connector development our Odoo integration expertise covers every platform type, every data flow, and every business scenario.
Connect Odoo to any modern platform using REST, SOAP, and GraphQL APIs. We design secure, reliable, and scalable API integrations that handle high data volumes without breaking under load.
Sync Odoo with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, Amazon, eBay, and other commerce platforms connecting products, orders, inventory, customers, and returns in real time across every channel.
Integrate Odoo with Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay, Square, Adyen, and other payment providers automating invoicing, reconciliation, refunds, and financial reporting without manual intervention.
Connect Odoo with Salesforce, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Brevo, MailerLite, and other CRM and marketing platforms keeping your customer data, campaigns, and pipelines unified and up to date.
Integrate Odoo with QuickBooks, Xero, Sage, Zoho Books, and other financial platforms automating reconciliation, journal entries, and financial reporting across systems.
Connect Odoo with FedEx, DHL, UPS, ShipStation, and other carriers automating shipment creation, tracking updates, delivery confirmation, and return management end to end.
Push Odoo data to Power BI, Google Looker Studio, Tableau, Google Sheets, and BigQuery enabling real-time dashboards, custom KPI tracking, and enterprise-grade analytics.
Connect Odoo to AWS, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, and SharePoint for automated document storage, backup, and file management across your business.
Integrate Odoo HR with external payroll systems, attendance tools, and recruitment platforms so employee data, leave records, and payroll figures stay consistent across systems.
Already running a legacy ERP, bespoke CRM, or a homegrown system? We build custom middleware and connectors that bridge Odoo with your existing infrastructure without forcing a full replacement.
Set up real-time, event-driven integrations using webhooks so when something happens in Odoo, your connected platforms respond instantly, without waiting for scheduled sync cycles.
No pre-built connector exists for your platform? We design and build fully custom Odoo integration connectors from scratch documented, tested, and built to last.

div.h2: Why Your Business Needs Odoo Integration to Stay Efficient
div.p: Odoo integration is not a technical exercise. It is a business transformation. Here is what changes when everything is connected.
Every team's sales, finance, operations, logistics works from the same data. No conflicting figures, no version confusion, no "which spreadsheet is correct?" conversations.
Tasks that took your team hours manual data entry, cross-platform reporting, order reconciliation happen automatically. Those hours go back to your business.
Manual data transfer introduces errors. Automated Odoo ERP integration eliminates the transfer entirely of data moves accurately between systems without human intervention.
When your systems are connected, your reporting is complete. Leaders can see the full operational picture in real time and make faster, more confident decisions.
Disconnected systems break when you scale. A properly integrated Odoo ecosystem handles 10x the volume without 10x the manual effort because the processes are automated, not people-dependent.

When your CRM, ERP, and fulfilment systems are connected, your customers experience faster responses, accurate order updates, and seamless service because your team has the right information instantly.

div.h2: Odoo Integration Solutions Built for Your Industry
div.p: Every industry has unique systems, unique data flows, and unique compliance requirements. Our Odoo integration expertise spans them all.
Connect MES systems, supplier portals, and production planning tools with Odoo for real-time shop floor visibility.
Unify POS, online stores, and marketplaces with Odoo for real-time inventory sync and multi-channel order management.
Connect carrier APIs, route planning tools, and WMS platforms with Odoo for end-to-end shipment visibility.
Integrate Odoo with accounting platforms, banking APIs, and payment gateways for automated reconciliation.
Sync patient management, billing, and compliance systems with Odoo to streamline clinical and administrative workflows.
Link project tools, time tracking, and CRM platforms with Odoo to keep service delivery and revenue reporting aligned.

div.h2: How Our Odoo Integration Experts Deliver Your Project
div.p: A structured, low-disruption process designed for remote collaboration with clear deliverables at every stage and no surprises at go-live.

We audit your existing systems, map your current data flows, and identify every integration touchpoint. We document what needs to connect, what data needs to move, and how often. Deliverable: Integration Requirements Document

We design the integration architecture defining data models, transformation rules, sync frequency, error handling logic, and security protocols before a single line of code is written. Deliverable: Integration Architecture Blueprint

Our Odoo integration experts build your connectors whether using pre-built modules, custom API development, or middleware with full testing in a sandboxed environment. Deliverable: Tested Integration Build

We run end-to-end testing with real data scenarios validating sync accuracy, error handling, performance under load, and rollback procedures before touching your live environment. Deliverable: QA Sign-Off & Test Report

We deploy to production with structured data migration, validation checks, and rollback plans in place ensuring zero disruption to your live operations during go-live. Deliverable: Live, Running Integration

We train your team on managing the integration, provide full technical documentation, and deliver continuous monitoring and support so your integration stays healthy long term. Deliverable: Trained Team + Support Plan

div.h2: Not Just an Odoo Integration Company Your Long-Term Integration Partner
div.p: Our Odoo integration expertise comes from years of building production-grade connectors for businesses across industries and we bring that depth to every engagement.

We don't just understand APIs, we understand Odoo's data model, its business logic, and how integrations interact with live ERP operations. That knowledge prevents the mistakes that cost businesses time and money to fix after go-live.
Our library of production-tested connectors for 3CX, TikTok Shop, Power BI, Google Sheets, Brevo, BigQuery, and more means faster deployment, lower cost, and proven reliability from day one.

div.h3: Custom Connectors When You Need Them
div.p: When no pre-built solution exists, we build custom connectors designed to your exact data requirements, fully documented, and built to be maintainable long after the project ends.
Every integration we build uses encrypted data transfer, proper authentication protocols, and structured error handling so your data is never at risk and your systems never fall out of sync silently.
Clear scope, fixed timelines, and regular progress updates designed to work for distributed and remote teams across any time zone. No black boxes, no surprises, no delays without communication.

Integrations evolve as platforms update their APIs, change data structures, and release new versions. We stay with you monitoring, updating, and optimising your integrations as your business and your tools change.
